message:
docs: update README with full provider list, architecture diagram,
and expanded project structure

- Update provider list to reflect all 10 supported providers including
  recently added Azure, Bedrock, Cohere, and Vertex alongside the
  original Anthropic, Gemini, OpenAI, OpenAI Responses, and xAI/Grok
- Refresh ASCII architecture diagram to show the complete provider fan-out
- Update project structure listing with new directories and files
  (fuzz/, tests/golden_corpus/, src/migrations.rs)
- Update FAQ and limitations table with current status

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
